segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Good morning. It's nice to see you again. How have you been since your last visit?

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: I've been doing okay overall, but I've been getting headaches more often recently.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Tell me more about the headaches. How often are they occurring?

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: Maybe three or four times a week. They're not severe, but they're annoying.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Where do you feel the pain?

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: Usually around my forehead and sometimes behind my eyes.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Have you noticed any vision changes, dizziness, chest pain, or shortness of breath?

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: No chest pain or shortness of breath. Sometimes I feel a little tired, but nothing major.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Have you been checking your blood pressure at home?

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: Yes. I've been checking it every few days.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: What numbers have you been seeing?

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: Most of the readings are around one hundred forty-five over ninety.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: That's consistent with what we're seeing today. Your blood pressure in the office is also one hundred forty-five over ninety.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: I was worried it might still be high.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Are you taking your medications as prescribed?

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: Yes. I'm taking atorvastatin forty milligrams every night.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Any side effects from the atorvastatin?

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: No, I've tolerated it well.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: How has your diet and exercise been?

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: I've been trying to walk a few times a week, but work has been busy and I haven't been very consistent.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Based on your blood pressure readings and persistent headaches, I think it's time to start medication to help control your hypertension.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: Okay. What do you recommend?

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: I'd like to start lisinopril ten milligrams once daily.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: Are there any side effects I should watch for?

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Some patients develop a dry cough or feel lightheaded when first starting it.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: Okay.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: We'll continue the atorvastatin forty milligrams, start lisinopril ten milligrams daily, and continue monitoring blood pressure at home.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: Sounds good.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: I'll also order routine blood work and schedule a follow-up visit in four weeks to see how you're responding.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: Thank you, doctor.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: You're welcome. Please call us if your headaches worsen or if you develop any new symptoms.
